title: gentiana altorum subsp. altorum
intro: Gentiana altorum subsp. altorum is a perennial plant species within the Gentianaceae family, commonly known as the Altar Plant or Altar Gentian. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gentiana altorum subsp. altorum include its ability to improve digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Gentiana altorum subsp. altorum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
